title: Windows BITS Job Abuse for Persistence
description: Detects abuse of Background Intelligent Transfer Service (BITS) for persistence or payload download. BITS jobs survive reboots and can notify on completion with arbitrary commands.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*bitsadmin.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*/SetNotifyCmdLine*' or 'Command Line' like '*/SetNotifyFlags*' or 'Command Line' like '*/AddFile*' or 'Command Line' like '*/Resume*')) or ('Command Line' like '*Start-BitsTransfer*'))
falsepositives: WSUS and SCCM using BITS for updates
